Video.summary: Robot Wars returns. The House Robots have been upgraded and are ready to dismantle any of the 40 competing teams brave enough to enter the hazardous arena.
Video.title: Series 8 - Heat A

Video.summary: A Consultant Cardiologist and his two sons try their luck with a brand new, untested machine. Judge Sethu Vijayakumar discusses his work with Nasa in creating androids for the Mission to Mars.
Video.title: Series 8 - Heat B

Video.summary: This show features an eclectic collection of home-made robots, one designed by a nine year old and another constructed out of wood. Some competitors from the Classic series return to the arena.
Video.title: Series 8 - Heat C

Video.summary: In this show we see the former Holiday camp Bluecoats daring to flip two of the House Robots with their ‘launcher’ Apollo. The most expensive Robot in the Series competes in this Heat.
Video.title: Series 8 - Heat D

Video.summary: The first heat of the second Revival Series begins. Robots return from previous series to take on the daring newcomers and each other. Competitors get bullied and thrown around the ring as they desperately try to scrape a place in the finals.
Video.title: Series 9 - Heat A

Video.summary: A tentative start to the second heat ends in carnage as the house robots and competitors go all out to qualify. Shunt delivers the final blow for one contestant.
Video.title: Series 9 - Heat B

Video.summary: The third heat shows devastating weapons put into action, being on the receiving end of these could mean elimination for an unlucky competitor. The house robots take on cleaning duties as they remove immobilised robots from the arena floor.
Video.title: Series 9 - Heat C

Video.summary: One competitor draws first blood only seconds into the first round. After suffering severe damage at the hands of another competitor, one robots chance at the finals may be lost.
Video.title: Series 9 - Heat D

Video.summary: The last chance for combatants to fight for a place in the Grand Final. With the newcomers outnumbering the veterans, will the first timers make up for their lack of experience?
Video.title: Series 9 - Heat E

Video.summary: This episode, a new Robot Wars champion will emerge! Sparks and scraps are sure to fly in this explosive series finale. Winners will have to make it through the four-way melees and head-to-head battles to be able to prove themselves in the final.
Video.title: Series 9 - Grand Final

Video.summary: Competitors are once again tasked with defending their land in King of the Castle, will they defend their reign or be overthrown by the house robots? An even match in the semi-finals causes the house robots to forcefully decide a winner.
Video.title: The Second Wars - Heat K

Video.summary: Dead Metal takes to the ring to stop any competitors from progressing to the stage of the competition.
Video.title: The Second Wars - Heat L

Video.summary: First of the two Semi-Finals to determine which two of the six heat winners will progress to The Second Wars Grand Finals. The house robots are showing no mercy in the gauntlet and the competitors test their accuracy in this week’s trial, Pinball.
Video.title: The Second Wars - Semi Final 1

Video.summary: The last Semi-Final, competitors will once again battle the house robots in Pinball, evade them in the gauntlet and use them to destroy other competitors in the arena.
Video.title: The Second Wars - Semi Final 2

Video.summary: The Grand Final arrives, only the best robots have made it this far. The four remaining robots face two eliminators and a playoff. The two winners then face each other to determine who will be named champion of Robot Wars: The Second wars.
Video.title: The Second Wars - Grand Final

Video.summary: An insightful view into how Robot Wars Series 1 was created.
Video.title: The Second Wars - Making of Robot Wars

Image.alt: The Second Wars - Making of Robot Wars
The Second Wars - Making of Robot Wars
The Second Wars - Making of Robot Wars

Video.summary: This features one of the most bizarre but certainly the tallest robot ever seen on Robot Wars, Gabriel, built my Mensa member Craig and his three sons.
Video.title: Series 8 - Heat E

Video.summary: In this show the heat winners in shows 1 to 5 come back to fight again. The judges must choose one Wild Card from the runners up to join them.
Video.title: Series 8 - Grand Final

Video.summary: The first ever Robot Wars heat begins. Six brave teams enter the arena for the first time as the four House Robots are unleashed to do what they were made for, turning competitors into twisted and scorched lumps.
Video.title: Series 1 - Heat A

Video.summary: Heat B features six contestants, all battling for a spot in the series finals. To make it through, they must prove their mettle in the Gauntlet, Trial (British Bulldog) and battle it out in the Arena.
Video.title: Series 1 - Heat B

Video.summary: The Grudge Matches gave competitors an opportunity to come back and settle some scores. A one-off episode featuring a variety of battles; Judgement Day, Reserve Rumble, Inferno Insurrection, Ramrombit, Super Showdown and Internet Insurrection.
Video.title: The Second Wars - Grudge Matches

Video.summary: Take a look back at the phenomenal second series, relive the highs and lows of the house robots and competitors of The Second Wars.
Video.title: The Second Wars - Best Of

Video.summary: Four UK robots versus four R.O.W robots, the World Series victor will be decided by points, over a two episode tournament. Fighting for glory and country, the pressure is on. Will the competitors do their compatriots proud?
Video.title: World Series - Episode 1

Video.summary: The wars wage on, with Team UK dominating this stage of the competition, will the home-ground advantage keep them on form, or will Team R.O.W cause a spectacular upset?
Video.title: World Series - Episode 2
